sizing_rule.note: Use optimal f=0.09 from historical P&L distribution. Do not adjust largest historical loss downward based on current volatility; maintain position sizing based on actual historical maxima to account for tail risk.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be based on optimal f calculated from historical percentage gains and losses, rather than shrinking the largest historical loss to reflect current low-volatility conditions, as future losses may exceed historically observed maxima.
